segments.title: Bread Pudding
steps: Grease the baking dishes generously on all sides with ['ing']{Unsalted butter}.
Cut ['ing']{Shokupan} into 1.5" cubes and space them evenly in the baking dish.
In a medium bowl, whisk ['ing']{Large Eggs} until blended.
Add ['ing']{Granulated sugar} and ['ing']{Salt}, whisking until fully dissolved.
Whisk in ['ing']{Vanilla extract}. Gradually add ['ing']{Whole milk} and mix until smooth.
Slowly pour half of the custard over the bread. Pause briefly, then pour in the remaining custard.
Bake at ['temp']{180} for 30-40 minutes, until puffed, lightly golden.
When the bread pudding starts to puff up and rise but is not browned yet, make the caramel sauce.

segments.title: Caramel
steps: In a small heavy-bottomed saucepan, combine ['ing']{Granulated sugar} and ['ing']{Water (room temperature)}.
Heat on medium-low without stirring until the sugar fully dissolves.
Increase heat to medium-high and cook until the sugar caramelizes to a deep amber, swirling the pan gently.
Remove from heat and carefully add ['ing']{Water (hot)} in stages, swirling until smooth.
Drizzle the hot caramel over the baked bread pudding and serve immediately.
